claims.claim: Homepage publicly accessible and value proposition clearly stated
claims.evidence: Build low-latency, multimodal LLM applications with the Realtime API.

claims.claim: Pricing page discoverable in 2 clicks from homepage
claims.evidence: The link to 'Pricing' is available directly on the homepage.

claims.claim: Documentation or live demo accessible without login
claims.evidence: The OpenAI Realtime API enables low-latency communication with models that natively support speech-to-speech interactions as well as multimodal inputs (audio, images, and text) and outputs (audio and text).

claims.claim: Integration list or supported frameworks documented
claims.evidence: There are three primary supported interfaces for the Realtime API: WebRTC connection, WebSocket connection, and SIP connection.

claims.claim: Authentication / data handling claims publicly stated
